description: Letter addressed to Abū l-Murajjā Sālim. Fragment (upper right corner of recto). Discussing in vague terms a situation in which the addressee needs to act beneficently: "...all doubt has now passed, and everything has become as clear as could be desired. Do not spare any effort in help and collaboration with all the other affairs of the ḥaver..." (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
